parameters.text: 🔥 Welcome to CalorAI  Start tracking your meals in seconds:  📝 /log   Log your food   Example: /log 2 eggs    📋 /meals   View your logged meals    📊 /summary   See your nutrition summary    ✏️ /update   Edit a meal   1. Use /meals   2. Pick a number   3. Send: /update 1 2 eggs
Provide Correct Data : Step1 -> /meals choose correct meal number then /update provide number
